---
title: "Solutions Propriétaires"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Harnesses Propriétaires

## Claude Code (Anthropic)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Anthropic |
| Modèle | Claude 4 Opus/Sonnet |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (plan Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Best-in-class reasoning, tool calling natif, terminal integration, multi-file edits, MCP support.

**Points faibles** : Télémétrie par défaut, coût (Claude Opus = $15/M input), pas de self-hosting.

```bash
# Installation
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# Désactiver télémétrie
export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1
```

## Cursor

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Anysphere |
| Modèle | GPT-4o, Claude 4, Gemini 2.5 |
| Niveau autonomie | L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Privacy Mode) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Privacy Mode) |

**Points forts** : IDE complet (fork VS Code), codebase indexing, multi-model, Composer (multi-file), Cursor Tab (autocomplétion).

**Points faibles** : Indexing envoie le code vers les serveurs, Privacy Mode payant.

## Windsurf (Codeium)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Codeium |
| Modèle | Claude 4, GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5 |
| Niveau autonomie | L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | ⚠️ Activée, pas d'opt-out clair |
| ZDR Enterprise | ⚠️ Partiel (exceptions: Remote Indexing, Memories, Recipes) |
| Training opt-out | ⚠️ Training sur prompts/outputs |

::: callout-warning
## Windsurf — Risque entreprise
Windsurf utilise les prompts/outputs pour le training sans opt-out clair. Le ZDR Enterprise a des exceptions (Remote Indexing, Memories, Recipes). **Non recommandé pour données sensibles sans contrat Enterprise négocié.**
:::

## GitHub Copilot

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | GitHub/Microsoft |
| Modèle | GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet |
| Niveau autonomie | L1-L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Copilot Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Intégration GitHub native, support multi-IDE (VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim), Copilot Workspace, Copilot Agent.

**Points faibles** : Moins puissant que Claude Code/Cursor pour l'agentic, télémétrie par défaut.

## Tabnine

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Tabnine (Tel Aviv) |
| Modèle | Propriétaire + Llama |
| Niveau autonomie | L1 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Tabnine Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Focus privacy, modèle on-prem disponible, autocomplétion LLM.

**Points faibles** : L1 seulement, pas d'agent, moins performant que la concurrence.

## Devin (Cognition)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Cognition Labs |
| Modèle | Propriétaire |
| Niveau autonomie | L4 |
| Licence | Propriétaire (SaaS) |
| Télémétrie | Activée |
| ZDR Enterprise | Non documenté |

**Points forts** : Premier "AI software engineer" fully-autonome, planning, terminal, browser.

**Points faibles** : Closed source, opaque, résultats mitigés en pratique, coût élevé.

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_PROP_START -->
### [gpt-engineer](https://github.com/AntonOsika/gpt-engineer)
CLI platform to experiment with codegen. Precursor to: https://lovable.dev

⭐ 55.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `autonomous-agent`, `code-generation`, `codebase-generation`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `gpt-4`, `gpt-engineer`

### [gpt-pilot](https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot)
The first real AI developer

⭐ 33.7k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `developer-tools`, `gpt-4`, `research-project`

### [oraios/serena](https://github.com/oraios/serena)
🐍 🏠 - A fully-featured coding agent that relies on symbolic code operations by using language servers.

⭐ 26.8k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `ide`, `jetbrains`

### [AgentsMesh](https://github.com/AgentsMesh/AgentsMesh)
The AI Agent Workforce Platform. Remote AI workstations (AgentPods) with PTY sandbox + git worktree isolation, multi-agent collaboration via channels and pod bindings, built-in Kanban with MR/PR in...

⭐ 2.3k | `Go` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent-orchestration`, `agentsmesh`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agent-workforce-platform`, `ai-coding`, `aider`, `claude-code`, `codex-cli`

### [Nanocoder](https://github.com/Nano-Collective/nanocoder)
Local-first CLI coding agent built with React and Ink. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 2.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `coding-agents`, `llm`, `llm-inference`, `ollama`, `openai`

### [envd](https://github.com/tensorchord/envd)
🏕️ Reproducible development environment for humans and agents

⭐ 2.2k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent`, `buildkit`, `code-agent`, `codex`, `developer-tools`, `development-environment`, `docker`, `hacktoberfest`

### [cjo4m06/mcp-shrimp-task-manager](https://github.com/cjo4m06/mcp-shrimp-task-manager)
📇 ☁️ 🏠 – A programming-focused task management system that boosts coding agents like Cursor AI with advanced task memory, self-reflection, and dependency management. ShrimpTaskManager

⭐ 2.1k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-22
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `codeagent`, `coding-assistant`, `cursor-ai`, `cursorai`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`

### [claude-code-tools](https://github.com/pchalasani/claude-code-tools)
Practical productivity tools for Claude Code, Codex-CLI, and similar CLI coding agents.

⭐ 1.9k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `claude-code`, `cli`, `cli-agent`, `code-agent`, `codex`, `codex-cli`, `context`, `llm`

### [zeroshot](https://github.com/the-open-engine/zeroshot)
CLI that orchestrates a planner, an implementer, and independent validators in isolated environments !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 1.7k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-22
**Tags** : `agent-loops`, `agent-orchestration`, `agentic-workflow`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `autonomous-agents`, `claude`, `cli`

### [MyAgents](https://github.com/hAcKlyc/MyAgents)
MyAgents - 优雅、易用的 Agent 桌面端 ，一站式 Agent 工作台与任务中心

⭐ 778 | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `claude-code`, `code-agent`, `desktop`, `manus`, `skills`

### [code-on-incus](https://github.com/mensfeld/code-on-incus)
Give each AI agent its own isolated machine with root, Docker, and systemd. Active defense detects and stops threats automatically.

⭐ 598 | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-22
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `ai-tools`, `anthropic`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `code-sandbox`, `coding-assistant`

### [RepoMaster](https://github.com/QuantaAlpha/RepoMaster)
RepoMaster: The open-source AI agent that masters GitHub. It turns any code repository into a powerful tool, achieving a new level of autonomous task-solving. An open alternative to Claude-Code.

⭐ 537 | `Python` | MAJ: 2026-07-18
**Tags** : `claude-code`, `code-agent`, `gittaskbench`, `mle-bench`, `openhands`, `swe-agent`

### [h5i](https://github.com/h5i-dev/h5i)
CLI that runs several coding agents (Claude Code, Codex) on the same task, each in its own isolated git worktree sandbox, has them peer-review each other, then a neutral verifier replays every cand...

⭐ 484 | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent-orchestration`, `agentic-ai`, `agentic-workflow`, `ai-coding`, `ai-coding-agent`, `ai-orchestration`, `ai-safety`, `ai-security`

### [coro-code](https://github.com/Blushyes/coro-code)
Open-source CLI coding agent, a free alternative to Claude Code. Generate, debug, and manage code seamlessly.

⭐ 367 | `Rust` | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `cli-agent`, `code-agent`, `gemini-cli`, `llm`

### [Govcraft/rust-docs-mcp-server](https://github.com/Govcraft/rust-docs-mcp-server)
🦀 🏠 - Provides up-to-date documentation context for a specific Rust crate to LLMs via an MCP tool, using semantic search (embeddings) and LLM summarization.

⭐ 288 | `Rust` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-safety`, `caching`, `cargo`, `coding-assistant`, `context-aware`, `crates-io`, `developer-tools`

### [SE-Agent](https://github.com/JARVIS-Xs/SE-Agent)
SE-Agent is a self-evolution framework for LLM Code agents. It enables trajectory-level evolution to exchange information across reasoning paths via Revision, Recombination, and Refinement, expandi...

⭐ 281 | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `claude-code`, `code-agent`, `code-fix`, `mcts`, `self-evolve`, `swe-agent`, `swe-bench`, `test-time-scaling`

### [GitTaskBench](https://github.com/QuantaAlpha/GitTaskBench)
Repo-level benchmark for real-world Code Agents: from repo understanding → env setup → incremental dev/bug-fixing → task delivery, with cost-aware α metric.

⭐ 257 | `Python` | MAJ: 2026-07-14
**Tags** : `claude-code`, `code-agent`, `code-llm`, `openhands`, `repo-level`, `repomaster`, `swe-agent`

### [FinSight](https://github.com/RUC-NLPIR/FinSight)
[ACL 2026 Main, SAC Highlight] FinSight: Towards Real-World Financial Deep Research. 🎯One ticker, one click, one publication-ready report.

⭐ 247 | `Jupyter Notebook` | Licence: GPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent`, `code-agent`, `deepresearch`, `finance-ai`, `financial`, `financial-analysis`, `llm`, `multi-agent-system`

### [riponcm/projectmem](https://github.com/riponcm/projectmem)
!projectmem MCP server 🐍 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - Local-first memory and judgment layer for AI coding agents. Captures issues, failed attempts, fixes, and decisions in readable Markdown + JSONL, re-injects them i...

⭐ 198 | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `ai-memory`, `ai-memory-layer`, `ai-tools`, `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `coding-assistant`

### [claude-code-sourcemap-learning-notebook](https://github.com/dadiaomengmeimei/claude-code-sourcemap-learning-notebook)
Reverse-engineering Claude Code's 512K+ lines of TypeScript — architecture, design decisions, and 11 transferable patterns for building AI Agents

⭐ 166 | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `code-agent`

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_PROP_END -->
